name: Bacterial contamination sensor (AI-2 + CRISPRi)
shortDescription: Flags general bacterial contamination by sensing autoinducer-2 (AI-2), the inter-species quorum signal made by most bacteria. The LsrR/AI-2 system gates a CRISPRi circuit driving a visible pigment, in safe E. coli K-12.

input.detects: AI-2, the universal inter-species quorum signal secreted by a broad range of bacteria — a proxy for general microbial contamination
input.operatingRange: LsrR/AI-2 system responds from sub-µM AI-2

sensing.sensorMechanism: Imported AI-2 is phosphorylated and binds the LsrR repressor, de-repressing the lsr (Plsr) promoter.
sensing.signalFlow: AI-2 -> phospho-AI-2 releases LsrR -> Plsr transcribes an anti-pigment sgRNA -> dCas9 + sgRNA repress a constitutive amilCP cassette (CRISPRi) -> pigment fades when bacteria are present (NOT gate); add an inverter for colour-on.

parts.name: LsrR repressor + Lsr transport
parts.notes: AI-2-responsive repressor; native to E. coli.

output.result: Colour change indicates bacterial quorum signal in the sample.

performance.notes: Detects a broad bacterial signal rather than one species; the LsrR AI-2 system and CRISPRi are validated separately and the integrated device is a design template.

safety.biocontainment: Safe E. coli K-12 reads a secreted small molecule; no pathogen handled.
safety.notes: Indirect, safe detection of contamination via a quorum signal.

buildSteps.title: Design anti-pigment sgRNA
buildSteps.description: Target the amilCP promoter; check host off-targets.

buildSteps.title: Assemble units
buildSteps.description: TU1: Plsr -> sgRNA (native Lsr import/LsrR). TU2: dCas9 + constitutive amilCP.

buildSteps.title: Transform E. coli K-12
buildSteps.description: Select; confirm baseline pigment without AI-2.

buildSteps.title: Add sample
buildSteps.description: Incubate with the water/food sample + AI-2 (DPD) standard curve.

provenance.source: Design template combining the LsrR/AI-2 quorum-sensing module with E. coli CRISPRi
partsSources: Xavier & Bassler 2005 / E. coli lsr-AI-2 system
provenance.license: Parts per their original sources; design template CC BY 4.0
